title: Chief Risk & Ethics Officer
summary: The Chief Risk & Ethics Officer helps Neuroartan grow with clear judgment, ethical discipline, and controlled risk.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role reviews ethical, operational, reputational, and platform-level risk as ICOS moves from product system into public use.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Protect Neuroartan’s long-term trust by keeping growth, product decisions, and public movement aligned with ethical clarity and controlled risk.
